name: UP2CLOUD Lead Funnel - Scoring and Follow-up

parameters.subject: 🔥 HOT LEAD - UP2CLOUD: {{$json.company || $json.name}}
Your UP2CLOUD audit request was received
parameters.message:
Hi {{$json.name}},

Thanks for requesting a Cloud Cost & AI Efficiency Audit.

We will review your cloud context, budget, timeline and automation goals. If there is strong fit, you will receive next steps shortly.

For faster scheduling, reply with 2 time windows that work for you.

Best,
Cesar
UP2CLOUD

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, status: $json.status, score: $json.score, message: 'Audit request received.' } }}
